# LumenWipe

> Non-custodial Stellar account wind-down tool built on the Stellar network.

LumenWipe enables Stellar users to safely close their accounts and recover locked XLM reserves. The tool handles the complete wind-down workflow: removing trustlines, cancelling open offers, exiting Soroban DeFi positions, and executing the final Account Merge operation. All operations are non-custodial - the user's secret key never leaves their browser.

## Key Features

- Account Merge: transfers the full XLM balance to a destination account and closes the source account
- Trustline removal: removes all asset trustlines to unlock the associated XLM reserves
- Open offer cancellation: cancels all outstanding DEX orders before account closure
- Soroban DeFi exit: withdraws from AMM and liquidity pool positions on supported protocols
- Testnet and Mainnet support

## Technology

Built on Next.js and the Stellar JavaScript SDK. Transactions are signed client-side and submitted directly to the Stellar network via the Soroban RPC. No backend holds or processes user funds.

## Target Users

Stellar account holders who want to exit the network, recover their minimum balance reserves, or consolidate multiple accounts into one.
